records.question: Which performances had an attendance of at most 1982?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.attendance <= 1982
records.pred_sql: SELECT Performance_ID FROM performance WHERE Attendance <= 1982

records.question: Which performances held at Verizon Center on February 7, hosted by the Pittsburgh Penguins, had an attendance of at least 1877?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.attendance >= 1877 AND performance.location = 'Verizon Center' AND performance.host = 'Pittsburgh Penguins' AND performance.date = 'February 7'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Performance_ID FROM performance WHERE Location = 'Verizon Center' AND Date = 'February 7' AND Host = 'Pittsburgh Penguins' AND Attendance >= 1877

records.question: Which performances at TD Garden hosted by Boston Bruins on February 2 had exactly 165 attendees?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
JOIN member_attendance ON performance.performance_id = member_attendance.performance_id
WHERE performance.attendance = 165 AND performance.location = 'TD Garden' AND performance.host = 'Boston Bruins' AND performance.date = 'February 2'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Performance_ID FROM performance WHERE Location = 'TD Garden' AND Host = 'Boston Bruins' AND Date LIKE '%February 2%' AND Attendance = 165

records.question: Which performances had attendance of at most 1878 and involved member attendance records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
JOIN member_attendance ON performance.performance_id = member_attendance.performance_id
WHERE performance.attendance <= 1878
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Performance_ID FROM performance AS T1 INNER JOIN member_attendance AS T2 ON T1.Performance_ID = T2.Performance_ID WHERE T1.Attendance <= 1878

records.question: Which performances have members who performed at most 2 pieces?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
JOIN member_attendance ON performance.performance_id = member_attendance.performance_id
WHERE member_attendance.num_of_pieces <= 2
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Performance_ID FROM performance AS T1 INNER JOIN member_attendance AS T2 ON T1.Performance_ID = T2.Performance_ID WHERE T2.Num_of_Pieces <= 2
